推荐场景: 会议结尾｜总结决定和下一步
60秒任务: 「总结决定」：议程/打断/反对/总结；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 会议组织｜打断｜反对｜补充｜总结｜决策确认
场景族: 办公室｜会议室｜远程会议｜走廊对话｜协作工具界面
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Let me summarize where we landed.（总结结论）
We agreed to move forward with ___.（确认方案）
The decision is to ___.（明确决定）
The main reason is ___.（说明理由）
We considered ___, but chose ___.（比较后选择）
The next step is for ___ to ___.（明确下一步）
___ will own this work.（分配负责人）
We’ll review progress on ___.（安排回顾）
Any objections before we close?（关闭前确认）
I’ll send a written summary.（会后总结）
Let’s make sure the timeline is realistic.（检查时间线）
This is not final until ___.（说明条件）
If anything changes, please flag it.（变更提醒）
Thanks, that gives us a clear direction.（积极收尾）
Can everyone confirm their part?（确认各自任务）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: summary, decision, reason, owner, timeline, progress, objection, direction
Verbs: summarize, agree, choose, own, review, confirm, close, flag
Adjectives / Status: final, realistic, clear, written, agreed, pending
Time / Place: before we close, after the meeting, on Monday, in writing, next review
Chunks: where we landed, move forward, written summary, clear direction, confirm your part
